title: Ametek (AME) Up 1% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?

title: Ametek: A Collection Of Niche Industrial Businesses
text: AMETEK's growth is driven by both organic contributions and acquisitions, with a strong focus on niche industrial markets. The company's pricing power in these niche industries allows them to offset cost pressures and maintain strong profitability. AMETEK has a healthy balance sheet and ample resources for future acquisitions, supported by strong cash flow and a low debt leverage ratio.

title: 5 Best Stocks to Buy for Remarkable Earnings Growth
text: Study a company's revenues over a given period, subtract the production cost, and you have earnings. Irrespective of whether it is a start-up or a well-known company, earnings growth is the main priority for any organization.

title: AMETEK Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: BERWYN, Pa. , Aug. 4, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of AMETEK, Inc. (NYSE: AME) declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share for the third quarter ending September 30, 2023.

title: Ametek (AME) Reports Q2 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: The headline numbers for Ametek (AME) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended June 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Ametek (AME) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Ametek (AME) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.57 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.52 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.38 per share a year ago.

title: AMETEK Announces Record Second Quarter Results and Raises 2023 Guidance
text: BERWYN, Pa. , Aug. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- AMETEK, Inc. (NYSE: AME) today announced its financial results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2023.
